output.reasoning: GreyOrange sells AI-driven warehouse automation solutions integrating robots and systems to businesses, focusing on physical automation equipment for logistics.
ReformPhase sells a 6-axis robotic printing system primarily for industrial and production use, targeting businesses needing high-precision fabrication, which aligns well with B2B robotics equipment.
The company offers an automated conveyor system which implies physical equipment, but the description emphasizes software automation and operational features rather than hardware sales or deployment.
The company designs and sells AI-enabled robotic systems for food production automation, targeting businesses in the food industry with physical robotic equipment and a B2B subscription model.
Geek+ designs and sells physical robotics systems for warehouse and logistics automation to commercial customers, integrating hardware with software for operational efficiency.
